Personal Information

Please provide your basic contact and professional details so we can reach you throughout the hiring process.

What is your full name?

What is your email address?

Where are you currently based? (City, Country)

What is your phone number?

Please share your LinkedIn profile URL. (Optional)

Do you have a portfolio, GitHub, or personal website? If so, please share the link.

Work Authorization

We ask these questions to understand your eligibility to work and plan accordingly. Some of our work may involve export-controlled technology.

Are you legally authorized to work in the US?

Do you currently require or anticipate requiring visa sponsorship?

Resume & Documents

Your resume is the foundation of your application. A portfolio or GitHub is highly encouraged for technical roles as it gives us a deeper look at your hands-on work.

Please upload your resume/CV. (required)

or drag and drop here

Would you like to include a cover letter? If so, please upload it here. (optional)

or drag and drop here

Experience & Background

Help us understand your professional background at a glance before we dive deeper into your experience.

How many years of experience do you have?

How many years of startup experience do you have?

What is your current or most recent job title?

Who is your current or most recent employer?

Logistics

These details help us assess whether there is a practical fit between your expectations and what the role offers.

What is your earliest available start date?

Equal Opportunity

The following questions are entirely optional and confidential. Your responses will not impact the outcome of your application. We collect this information solely to track and improve diversity across our hiring process.

How do you identify your gender?

What is your ethnicity?

Have you served in the military or do you identify as a veteran?

Do you have a disability you would like us to be aware of and accommodate?

Trener may use Artificial Intelligence with this application. Learn more.
